text: The Word became flesh without losing His divinity, and remained God without changing His humanity.
Prayer is the key to the morning and the bolt of the evening.
Let your heart be a sanctuary where only the light of Christ resides.
Humility is the garment of the Godhead.
The Word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
In the world you will have tribulation; but be of good cheer, I have overcome the world.
Come to Me, all you who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
I will praise You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; marvelous are Your works.
